assets.extraction_prompt: Using the approved hero reference, provide only the hero background with no text, buttons, logo, people, or UI labels.
assets.implementation_usage: Use as the hero environmental background. Overlay headline, copy, and CTA as native HTML/CSS.
assets.approval_gate: background matches lighting, atmosphere, palette, and spatial depth from canonical reference

assets.extraction_prompt: Using the approved hero reference, provide only the primary button as a clean isolated reference with no surrounding page elements.
assets.implementation_usage: Recreate the button as native CSS. Do not rasterize text inside the button.
assets.approval_gate: button glow, radius, weight, contrast, and hover implication match canonical reference

assets.extraction_prompt: Using the approved visual language, provide a page divider asset that transitions from the hero atmosphere into the next section.
assets.implementation_usage: Use as a decorative divider or CSS background layer between sections.
assets.approval_gate: divider feels native to the same brand system and does not introduce a second visual language

assets.role: supporting feature or proof section background
assets.extraction_prompt: Using the approved hero direction, provide a wide banner background for a proof or feature section with no baked-in text.
assets.implementation_usage: Use behind native text and proof metrics in the implementation layer.
assets.approval_gate: banner preserves reference lighting, depth, and premium pacing without competing with the hero

handoff_to_kimi.instruction: Implement from the approved asset kit. Preserve raster atmosphere and recreate controls natively unless the asset is explicitly decorative.
